info.title: NS1 API
info.description: NS1 (IBM NS1 Connect) DNS and Traffic Management API. Provides programmatic access to manage DNS zones, records, data sources, data feeds, monitoring jobs, account settings, teams, API keys, usage statistics, and networks.

get.description: Returns a list of all DNS zones associated with the account.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns the full details of a single DNS zone, including its records.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: The zone name (e.g., example.com)

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

put.description: Creates a new DNS zone or updates an existing one.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: The zone name (e.g., example.com)

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

delete.description: Permanently deletes a DNS zone and all of its records.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: The zone name (e.g., example.com)

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns the full details of a single DNS record including answers, filters, and metadata.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: The zone name (e.g., example.com)

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The fully qualified domain name of the record (e.g., www.example.com)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The DNS record type (e.g., A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, NS, SRV, etc.)

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

put.summary: Create or update a DNS record
put.description: Creates a new DNS record or replaces an existing one entirely.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: The zone name (e.g., example.com)

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The fully qualified domain name of the record

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The DNS record type

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

post.description: Performs a partial update on an existing DNS record. Only the fields provided in the request body are modified.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: The zone name (e.g., example.com)

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The fully qualified domain name of the record

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The DNS record type

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

delete.description: Permanently deletes a DNS record from the zone.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: The zone name (e.g., example.com)

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The fully qualified domain name of the record

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The DNS record type

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns a list of all data sources configured in the account.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns the details of a single data source.

parameters.name: sourceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the data source

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

put.summary: Create or update a data source
put.description: Creates a new data source or updates an existing one.

parameters.name: sourceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the data source

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

delete.description: Permanently deletes a data source and all of its associated feeds.

parameters.name: sourceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the data source

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

post.summary: Publish data to a data source
post.description: Publishes data to a data source, which is then propagated to all connected data feeds and their associated DNS records.

parameters.name: sourceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the data source

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.summary: List data feeds for a source
get.description: Returns all data feeds associated with a given data source.

parameters.name: sourceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the parent data source

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns the details of a single data feed.

parameters.name: sourceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the parent data source

parameters.name: feedId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the data feed

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

put.summary: Create or update a data feed
put.description: Creates a new data feed or updates an existing one for the given data source.

parameters.name: sourceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the parent data source

parameters.name: feedId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the data feed

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

delete.description: Permanently deletes a data feed from the given data source.

parameters.name: sourceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the parent data source

parameters.name: feedId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the data feed

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns a list of all monitoring jobs configured in the account.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns the details of a single monitoring job.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the monitoring job

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

put.summary: Create or update a monitoring job
put.description: Creates a new monitoring job or updates an existing one.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the monitoring job

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the monitoring job

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns a list of all available monitoring regions from which jobs can be run.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key
Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

post.description: Updates the account settings with the provided values.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns the current usage warning thresholds and notification settings.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

post.description: Updates usage warning thresholds and notification settings.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns a list of all teams configured in the account.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns the details of a single team including its permissions and members.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the team

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

put.description: Creates a new team or updates an existing one with the provided permissions and settings.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the team

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

delete.description: Permanently deletes a team from the account.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the team

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns a list of all API keys configured in the account.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns the details of a single API key including its permissions.

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the API key

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

put.summary: Create or update an API key
put.description: Creates a new API key or updates an existing one with the provided permissions.

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the API key

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

delete.description: Permanently deletes an API key from the account.

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the API key

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns the current real-time queries per second (QPS) for the account.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns aggregated query usage statistics for the account over a given time period.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The time period for the usage stats (e.g., 1h, 24h, 30d)

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

get.description: Returns a list of all networks available to the account. Networks represent separate DNS resolution namespaces.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

apiKey.name: X-NSONE-Key
apiKey.description: NS1 API key passed in the X-NSONE-Key header

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response returned by the NS1 API

Zone.description: A DNS zone managed by NS1

ttl.description: Default TTL in seconds for records in this zone

dns_servers.description: Authoritative nameservers assigned to this zone

network_pools.description: Network pool IDs assigned to this zone

primary.description: Primary zone configuration for secondary zone setups

records.description: List of DNS records in this zone (returned with zone details)

link.description: If this is a linked zone, the zone it is linked to

meta.description: Zone-level metadata used for traffic management

ZoneInput.description: Input body for creating or updating a zone

link.description: Zone to link to (creates a linked zone)

RecordSummary.description: Summary of a DNS record as returned in zone listings

link.description: If this is a linked record, the record it links to

zone.description: The zone this record belongs to

use_client_subnet.description: Whether to use EDNS Client Subnet for this record

answers.description: List of answer objects for this record

filters.description: List of filter chain entries applied to answers

link.description: If this is a linked record, the record it links to

RecordInput.description: Input body for creating or updating a DNS record

use_client_subnet.description: Whether to use EDNS Client Subnet

link.description: Record to link to (creates a linked record)

Answer.description: A single answer (resource record) within a DNS record

answer.description: The answer rdata, each element represents one rdata field

region.description: The region this answer is associated with

meta.description: Answer-level metadata for traffic management (e.g., up, weight, priority)

feeds.description: Data feeds connected to this answer

region.description: The region to associate this answer with

FeedReference.description: Reference to a data feed connected to an answer

Filter.description: A filter in the record's filter chain

filter.description: The filter type name (e.g., up, geotarget_country, weighted_shuffle, etc.)

disabled.description: Whether this filter is currently disabled

FilterInput.description: Input for a filter chain entry

DataSource.description: A data source for NS1 intelligent DNS

name.description: Human-readable name of the data source

sourcetype.description: The type of data source (e.g., nsone_v1, nsone_monitoring, cloudwatch, datadog, etc.)

status.description: Current status of the data source

feeds.description: List of data feeds associated with this source

DataSourceInput.description: Input for creating or updating a data source

DataSourcePublish.description: Data payload to publish to a data source

DataFeed.description: A data feed associated with a data source

config.description: Feed-specific configuration and label matching criteria

DataFeedInput.description: Input for creating or updating a data feed

MonitoringJob.description: A monitoring job that checks the health of an endpoint

name.description: Human-readable name of the monitoring job

job_type.description: The type of monitoring check (e.g., http, tcp, dns, ping)

active.description: Whether the monitoring job is currently active

regions.description: List of region codes from which this job runs

config.description: Job-type-specific configuration (e.g., host, port, url, etc.)

rules.description: Rules that define pass/fail criteria for the monitoring check

notify_delay.description: Delay in seconds before sending a notification

notify_repeat.description: Interval in seconds between repeated notifications

notify_failback.description: Whether to send a notification when the job recovers

notify_regional.description: Whether to notify for regional failures in addition to global

notify_list.description: Notification list ID for this job

notes.description: Free-form notes about this monitoring job

status.description: Current status of the monitoring job per region

MonitoringJobInput.description: Input for creating or updating a monitoring job

MonitoringRule.description: A rule defining pass/fail criteria for a monitoring check

key.description: The metric key to evaluate (e.g., rtt, connect, output, status_code)

MonitoringRegion.description: A monitoring region from which jobs can be executed

subnets.description: IP subnets used by monitoring probes in this region

UsageWarnings.description: Usage warning thresholds and notification settings

enabled.description: Whether query usage warnings are enabled

threshold.description: Query count threshold that triggers the warning

enabled.description: Whether record count warnings are enabled

threshold.description: Record count threshold that triggers the warning

UsageWarningsInput.description: Input for updating usage warning settings

Team.description: An account team with specific permissions

ip_whitelist.description: IP addresses allowed for this team

TeamInput.description: Input for creating or updating a team

Permissions.description: Permission set for teams and API keys

ApiKey.description: An API key for authenticating with the NS1 API

key.description: The API key value (only shown on creation)

teams.description: Team IDs this key belongs to

ip_whitelist.description: IP addresses allowed for this key

ip_whitelist_strict.description: Whether to enforce strict IP whitelist checking

last_access.description: Unix timestamp of last key usage

ApiKeyInput.description: Input for creating or updating an API key

queries.description: Total number of queries in the period

period.description: The time period these stats cover

graph.description: Time-series data points of query counts

queries.description: Number of queries at this timestamp

tags.name: DataSources
tags.description: Manage data sources for intelligent DNS

tags.name: DataFeeds
tags.description: Manage data feeds attached to data sources

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Manage account settings and usage warnings
